mapper.insert: INSERT INTO university_review ( user_id, university_id, campus_id, content, dormitory_score, canteen_score, location_score, study_score, culture_score, club_score, employment_score, campus_score, overall_score, is_anonymous ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{universityId}, #{campusId}, #{content}, #{dormitoryScore}, #{canteenScore}, #{locationScore}, #{studyScore}, #{cultureScore}, #{clubScore}, #{employmentScore}, #{campusScore}, #{overallScore}, #{isAnonymous} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) END AS nickname, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatarUrl, r.university_id, r.campus_id, c.name AS campus_name, r.content, r.dormitory_score, r.canteen_score, r.location_score, r.study_score, r.culture_score, r.club_score, r.employment_score, r.campus_score, r.overall_score, r.is_anonymous, r.create_time, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_like rl WHERE rl.review_id = r.id ) AS like_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_reply rr WHERE rr.review_id = r.id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ) AS reply_count, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review_like current_like WHERE current_like.review_id = r.id AND current_like.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked_by_current_user FROM university_review r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN campus c ON r.campus_id = c.id WHERE r.university_id = #{universityId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, university_id, campus_id, content, dormitory_score, canteen_score, location_score, study_score, culture_score, club_score, employment_score, campus_score, overall_score, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM university_review WHERE id = #{reviewId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE university_review SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO review_like (review_id, user_id) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId})
INSERT INTO review_reply (review_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, review_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM review_reply WHERE id = #{replyId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE review_reply SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{replyId} AND is_deleted = 0
